title: MinePlay+
description: This is collection of mods primarly used on server MinePlay+.
body:
## MinePlay+



### Info:

<details>
<summary>English</summary>

This is a modpack used primarly on a server called Mineplay+.

You can use this modpack for your own needs.


</details>


<details>
<summary>Czech</summary>

Tento balíček modů byl určen pro minecraftový server, MinePlay+

Tento balíček modů můžete použít k vlastní potřebě.
</details>



**(compatible with Optifine)**
<details>
<summary>Mods</summary>



## Mods Used: v3.0.0 (without api mods)
- Advanced Netherite
- Advancment Plaques
- Alex's Mobs
- AntiXray
- AppleSkin
- Better Archeology
- Better Combat
- Better Tridents
- Carry On
- Clumps
- Create
- Create: Enchantment Industry
- Create: Stuff & Additions
- Create: Connected
- Create: Interactive
- Create: More Drill Heads
- Create: Power Loader
- Create: Steam n' Rails
- Creeper Overhaul
- Delightful
- Dungeons Weapons
- Embeddium
- Embeddium (Rubidium) Extra
- Enchantment Descriptions
- Enderman Overhaul
- Entity Culling
- Farmer's Delight

- Simple Voice Chat
- Stellarity
- Supplementaries
- Traveler's Backpack
- YUNG's Better Desert Temples
- YUNG's Better Dungeons
- YUNG's Better Mineshafts
